title: Gergapack III
description: Version 1.20.1 | A Proper Modded Experience | Build, Fight and Explore!
body:
![Gergapack 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3759166d1666694aad45c40535dd4e0bd895894.png)

**Featured in Gergapack III:**

- Completely Overhauled World Generation
- Overhauled Structures
- New Dungeons and Structures to Explore
- QoL Improvements with Automation and Machinery
- 150+ Mods
- Custom Mod for an in-depth Lore
- Improved Terrain Generation
